Preterit.turoyo: mtarásle-li ádyawma b-dukṯe d-ruḥe qayəm hano Mḥammaye Elo məḷḷe l-am=Mədwoye baxti alxu ṭr=oṯən u=săwāl-aṯxu sīdan w-diḏan oṯən sīdayxu mede bayn elan w-alxu layt mətyaqanne qayimi mṭaraṣṣe u=săwāl-aṯṯe l-u=ḥdud d-bayn alle w-l- Mḥammaye Elo
translations:
er
			hat mich heute an seiner Stelle hergeschickt

ammaye
			Elo said to the inhabitants of Midin: “You have my word. Let
			your cattle come to us, and let ours come to you. There is nothing
			(bad) between you and us”. – And they believed him and sent
			their cattle to the border between them and M

Infectum.turoyo: mtarasn-a aʕmux; 167; 62/301; Пример отсутствует в указанном месте

translations:
Gott
			hat mir nie viel Glücksgüter geschickt
